visualDirection: Original HD 2D neo-arcade side-scrolling action; crisp silhouettes, steel-blue industrial harbor palette, cyan player identity and orange danger accents.
generationRules: All final images are generated specifically for this game through the built-in Codex imagegen skill.
No franchise characters, vehicles, sprites, logos, UI, music or distinctive expression are copied.
Raw chroma-key sources and cleaned transparent runtime assets are retained separately.
Animation identity, equal virtual cells, fixed baseline and root anchor take priority over dramatic composition.
Runtime backgrounds are 3840x2160 RGB; sprites are RGBA with transparent corners and safe padding.
